_comment: DevOps latency investigation, fictional AWS account 123456789012. Checkout latency spiked 200ms -> 2.5s. Hypotheses ranked by structural plausibility + historical frequency, organized for parallel testing per Ch5 'Constructing the Investigation DAG'.

tasks.description: Database connection pool exhaustion (caused similar symptoms 3x in 6 months)
Network partition between payment and database; only test after ruling out h1
Gather corroborating evidence for the confirmed hypothesis
